data.title: Parsons chosen to design VIA Rapid Silver Line in San Antonio by VIA Metropolitan Transit Authority.
data.description: In Chantilly, Virginia on December 23, 2025, Parsons Corporation (NYSE: PSN) revealed their recent selection by the VIA Metropolitan Transit Authority (VIA) to finalize the design for the Advanced Rapid Transit (ART) initiative for the VIA Rapid Silver Line project in San Antonio.

data.title: Strategy sells more stock to cover interest obligations, prepares for storm after Bitcoin rally disappointment.
data.description: Strategy recently decided to sell additional stock in order to bolster its reserve fund to meet interest obligations. Despite this move, Bitcoin did not receive the expected boost from the Santa Rally, leaving Strategy prepared for potential challenges ahead. The decision to increase the reserve fund comes amidst a shifting market landscape, highlighting the company's proactive approach to managing financial uncertainty.

data.title: TransUnion appoints Sayan Chakraborty and Charlotte Yarkoni to its Board of Directors, effective Jan 5, 2026.
data.description: TransUnion, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol TRU, announced on December 23, 2025, that Sayan Chakraborty and Charlotte Yarkoni have been appointed to its Board of Directors. The new members will officially join the board on January 5, 2026.

data.title: Marisa Tomei's Terra Mare Derma Renew wins 2025 Beauty & Collagen Innovation Award for helping mature skin look firmer.
data.description: Recognized for its noticeable lifting results and capacity to enhance the appearance of aging skin by making it more firm, plump, and youthful, Terra Mare® has been commended. Created by Academy Award winner Marisa Tomei, the supplement brand based in Los Angeles received this honor on December 23, 2025, as reported by PRNewswire.

data.title: Aptos (APT) aims for $1.24-$1.61 by Q1 2026 with mixed signals. Price may dip to $1.24 but upgrade could push it to $1.61 soon.
data.description: The forecast for APT indicates a downward trend with a potential decline to the support level of $1.24; however, progress in quantum upgrades might lead to a rebound towards a resistance level of $1.61 in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: Q101 Foundation partners with Mynd.ai to expand North American market; MOU signed with global tech leader. (Total characters: 108)
data.description: In Seattle on December 23, 2025, the Q101 Foundation revealed its plans to establish a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Mynd.ai, a prominent player in classroom technology listed on the NYSE American as MYND. Mynd.ai will take on the role of collaborating with the Foundation as outlined in the MOU.

data.title: NEAR price may hit $1.55-$1.65 by Jan 2026 with 3-10% upside in 4 weeks. Oversold RSI and bullish MACD indicate recovery from $1.50.
data.description: The forecast for NEAR Protocol indicates a potential increase of 3-10%, with the price potentially reaching $1.55-$1.65 in the next 4 weeks. This projection is supported by the oversold Relative Strength Index (RSI) and bullish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) histogram. Currently priced at $1.50, the cryptocurrency shows signs of recovering and gaining momentum.

data.title: Good Times Restaurants (NASDAQ: GTIM) set to report earnings on December 23, 2025. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
data.description: Before the market opens, investors can expect Good Times Restaurants (NASDAQ: GTIM) to release its quarterly earnings report. Conversely, post-market, other companies will be reporting their financial performance. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: XLM aims for $0.30 rebound in 4 weeks despite consolidation. Support at $0.22, with targets at $0.225-$0.30. Possible 36% increase by January 2026.
data.description: Stellar (XLM) is currently at a crucial juncture, testing crucial support at $0.22, with analysts setting price targets between $0.225 and $0.30. Technical analysis indicates a potential 36% increase if important levels are maintained until January 2026.
